summary: Chinese entrepreneur, teacher, livestream seller, and meme icon fighting with speeches, debts, phones, and stubborn charisma.

idle.startPose: Relaxed stance, one hand raised like beginning a lecture.
idle.endPose: Chin lifted, fists loose, shoulders proudly squared.
idle.motion: He rocks gently, preparing another devastating public statement.
idle.flavor: A tiny Smartisan phone glints like emotional armor.

walk.startPose: Forward lean, palm open, mouth mid-sentence.
walk.endPose: Heavy step planted, finger pointing at unseen doubters.
walk.motion: He strides like entering a product launch and an argument.
walk.flavor: Each step sounds like unpaid debt becoming paid debt.

attack1.startPose: Left hand guards, right finger cocked like a microphone.
attack1.endPose: Finger jab extended straight into the opponent’s ego.
attack1.motion: He snaps forward with a sharp lecturing poke.
attack1.flavor: The jab quotes: tough lives need no explanation.

attack2.startPose: Both hands grip an invisible refrigerator door.
attack2.endPose: Arms swing down, body twisted after impact.
attack2.motion: He yanks, pivots, and smashes downward with consumer-rights fury.
attack2.flavor: A Siemens fridge complaint becomes a legal uppercut.

intro.startPose: Standing still, glasses adjusted, phone held like a relic.
intro.endPose: Arms spread, smirking as if unveiling destiny.
intro.motion: He clears his throat, then performs a dramatic launch keynote.
intro.flavor: The crowd hears three seconds of pure Smartisan sentimentality.

death.startPose: Staggering backward, one hand clutching his livestream script.
death.endPose: Collapsed sitting, still raising one stubborn finger.
death.motion: He falls slowly, refusing to stop explaining the situation.
death.flavor: Even defeated, he schedules another debt-repayment episode.

super.startPose: Feet planted wide, microphone raised, coat flaring.
super.endPose: Pointing forward, surrounded by shattered phones and receipts.
super.motion: He unleashes a rapid-fire speech barrage and livestream product storm.
super.flavor: 交个朋友 becomes a full-screen capitalism meteor shower.
